data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Spot Silver Sees 1% Daily Increase, Now at $76.34 per Ounce
data.description: Spot silver prices have expanded their daily gains to 1.00%, currently trading at $76.34 per ounce. According to Jin10, this increase reflects ongoing market dynamics influencing precious metals.

data.title: STOCKS | Asian Equities Climb as Oil Prices Decline Amid U.S.-Iran Peace Talk Hopes
data.description:
Asian stock markets experienced an uptick as oil prices fell, driven by optimism surrounding potential peace talks between the United States and Iran. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X that investors are closely monitoring developments in the diplomatic relations between the two nations, which could have significant implications for global markets.

The anticipation of further dialogue between the U.S. and Iran has contributed to a positive sentiment in Asian equities, as investors hope for a resolution that could stabilize geopolitical tensions and impact oil supply dynamics. The decline in oil prices reflects the market's response to the possibility of easing tensions, which could lead to increased oil exports from Iran.

Market analysts suggest that the ongoing discussions could pave the way for a more stable economic environment, benefiting various sectors. However, they also caution that the situation remains fluid, and any setbacks in the negotiations could reverse the current market trends.

Overall, the prospect of improved U.S.-Iran relations is being viewed as a potential catalyst for market stability, with investors keeping a close watch on the developments in the coming days.

data.title: Associated Press: The United States and Iran may hold a new round of talks on Thursday.
data.description: According to the Associated Press, the United States and Iran may hold a new round of talks on Thursday. Trump stated, "They have contacted us," and "They want to reach an agreement."

data.title: AI Tool Enhances Excel File Creation and Editing
data.description: On April 14, a new feature called 'Table Agent' was launched by Qianwen, enabling users to directly create and edit Excel files during conversations. According to Odaily, users can request Qianwen to retrieve information and generate tables, organize multi-round dialogue content into tables, or create tables based on images and files. The system typically outputs a downloadable Excel file within 1–2 minutes, eliminating the need for additional copying and pasting, and supports modifications through natural language.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a net inflow of $1.463 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the XRP spot ETF saw a net inflow of $1.463 million yesterday (April 13th, Eastern Time). Only the Franklin XRP ETF (XRPZ) saw a net inflow yesterday, with a single-day net inflow of $1.463 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $326 million. As of press time, the XRP spot ETF's total net asset value is $959 million, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.16%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.221 billion.

data.title: A whale holding over $100 million in assets increased its short positions in BTC and ETH, incurring a cumulative loss of over $66.19 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale that opened a short position of 255 BTC has increased its short positions in BTC (40x leverage) and ETH (25x leverage), and is currently experiencing a floating loss of over $4 million. The whale's profits have decreased from over $25 million to a loss of over $41 million, with a cumulative loss exceeding $66.19 million. It currently holds 1031 BTC, worth $76.7 million, and 11560 ETH, worth $24.4 million.

data.title: Indonesia's $15 Billion Plan to Feed Millions Faces Scrutiny
data.description:
Indonesia's President Prabowo Subianto has unveiled an ambitious $15 billion initiative aimed at providing free meals to nearly 83 million citizens, including children and pregnant women. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the scale and potential impact of this program. While the plan has garnered attention for its potential to address food insecurity, it has also faced criticism regarding its feasibility and sustainability.

Critics argue that the program's massive scale could lead to logistical challenges and financial strain on the country's resources. Concerns have been raised about the government's ability to effectively implement and manage such a large-scale initiative without encountering significant obstacles.

Despite these concerns, supporters of the plan emphasize its potential to significantly improve the nutritional status of millions of Indonesians, particularly vulnerable groups such as children and pregnant mothers. The program is seen as a bold step towards addressing long-standing issues of hunger and malnutrition in the country.

As the plan moves forward, it remains to be seen whether it will achieve its ambitious goals or face setbacks due to the challenges highlighted by its critics. The success of this initiative could have far-reaching implications for Indonesia's social and economic landscape.

data.title: The Qianwen online form agent allows users to generate and edit Excel files simply by engaging in dialogue.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported on April 14th that Qianwen launched "Table Agent," supporting the direct generation and editing of Excel files within conversations. Users can request Qianwen to retrieve information and generate tables, organize multi-turn conversations into tables, or generate tables based on images or documents. The system typically outputs downloadable Excel files within 1-2 minutes, eliminating the need for secondary copying and pasting, and supports editing via natural language. (Jinshi)

data.title: Meta's net advertising revenue is projected to reach $243.4 billion, surpassing Google this year to become the world's largest digital advertising platform.
data.description: According to the WSJ, Meta is expected to surpass Google this year to become the world's largest digital advertising platform, with net advertising revenue projected to reach $243.46 billion, compared to Google's $239.54 billion.

data.title: Binance to Update Monitoring and Seed Tags for Select Tokens
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform will extend its Monitoring Tag to include additional tokens and remove the Seed Tag from a specific token on 2026-04-14. The tokens to be added to the Monitoring Tag list are Harvest Finance (FARM), Highstreet (HIGH), Enzyme (MLN), Resolv (RESOLV), Syscoin (SYS), TrueFi (TRU), and Velodrome Finance (VELODROME). Meanwhile, Tether Gold (XAUT) will be removed from the Seed Tag list.

Tokens with the Monitoring Tag are characterized by higher volatility and risks compared to other listed tokens. These tokens undergo regular reviews to ensure they meet Binance's listing criteria. Users interested in trading tokens marked with the Monitoring Tag or Seed Tag must pass a quiz every 90 days on the Binance Spot and/or Binance Margin platforms and agree to the Terms of Use. This process is designed to ensure that users are aware of the risks associated with trading these tokens.

The Monitoring Tags and Seed Tags can be found on the Binance Spot and Binance Margin trading pages, as well as on the Markets Overview page. A risk warning banner will also be displayed for all tokens with these tags. Binance will conduct periodic project reviews to determine if the Monitoring Tag and Seed Tag should be added or removed based on several criteria, including the commitment of the team to the project, the level and quality of development activity, trading volume and liquidity, network stability, and evidence of unethical conduct. Other services related to the mentioned tokens will remain unaffected. The updates to the Monitoring Tags and Seed Tags will be implemented shortly after the announcement's publication.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Copper Prices Surge Amid US-Iran Peace Talk Optimism
data.description: Copper prices have reached their highest level in over a month, driven by optimism surrounding potential peace talks between the United States and Iran. Bloomberg posted on X that this development has also positively impacted other industrial metals, which have generally seen an upward trend. The anticipation of renewed diplomatic discussions has bolstered market sentiment, contributing to the rise in metal prices. Traders are closely monitoring the situation as it unfolds, with hopes that successful negotiations could lead to increased stability in the region, further influencing the commodities market.

data.title: UK and France to Convene Meeting on Hormuz Strait Shipping Security
data.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced on the 13th that he will co-host a meeting with French President Emmanuel Macron this week to discuss shipping security in the Strait of Hormuz. According to Odaily, Starmer addressed the UK Parliament, stating that the meeting will focus on diplomatic efforts to end conflicts, reopen the strait, and ensure safety for international shipping once stability is restored. Starmer emphasized that the UK's stance on the Middle East should prioritize de-escalation and diplomatic resolution of disputes. The UK will neither support nor participate in any blockade actions concerning the Strait of Hormuz.

data.title: Crypto markets rallied across the board, with the DeFi sector leading the gains at 5%, and BTC breaking through $74,000.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, rising expectations of a US-Iran agreement have restored market confidence, leading to widespread gains in the crypto market, with the DeFi sector performing particularly well, up 5.00% in the last 24 hours. Hyperliquid (HYPE) rose 7.06%, while Lido DAO (LDO) and Aave (AAVE) rose 9.94% and 10.75% respectively. Meanwhile, Bitcoin (BTC) rose 4.51%, surpassing $74,000; Ethereum (ETH) rose 7.56%, surpassing $2,300. Notably, MAG7.ssi rose 4.23%, DEFI.ssi rose 6.22%, and MEME.ssi rose 3.27%. In other sectors, the RWA sector rose 4.05% in the last 24 hours, with Plume (PLUME) surging 13.92%; the CeFi sector rose 2.78%, and NEXO (NEXO) rose 3.79%; the Layer 1 sector rose 2.76%, and Algorand (ALGO) rose 8.11%; the Layer 2 sector rose 2.75%, and Optimism (OP) rose 6.90%; the PayFi sector rose 2.59%, and Telcoin (TEL) rose 12.07%; the Meme sector rose 1.85%, and Binance Life rose 13.20%. Crypto sector indices reflecting historical sector performance show that the ssiDeFi, ssiLayer1, and ssiRWA indices rose 5.69%, 5.67%, and 4.65%, respectively.

data.title: Barclays: Thailand's Central Bank to Maintain Policy Rate at 1.00% Until 2026
data.description: On April 14, Jin10 reported that economists at Barclays have released a report indicating that the Bank of Thailand is expected to keep its policy rate at 1.00% until 2026. According to Jin10, the Governor of the Bank of Thailand recently stated that the central bank intends to maintain the current policy rate for as long as possible and avoid raising interest rates. Barclays highlighted that the central bank is more concerned about the impact of Middle Eastern conflicts on Thailand's economic growth rather than higher inflation rates. The report also noted that the Bank of Thailand has previously expressed a preference to overlook supply shocks and the subsequent rise in inflation.

data.title: LD Capital Founder Warns Against Altcoin Futures Trading
data.description: Jack Yi, founder of LD Capital, has expressed concerns over altcoin futures trading, describing it as a 'guaranteed losing game.' According to NS3.AI, Yi highlighted the inherent high-risk nature of altcoins, which makes futures trading particularly perilous. He noted a recent trend of traders facing liquidations in altcoin futures, underscoring the volatility and risk associated with these assets.

data.title: High-Leverage ETH Short Position Faces Multiple Liquidations
data.description: A cryptocurrency address has experienced eight liquidations within a few hours, leaving only $10,600 in the account. According to Foresight News, the address continues to maintain a high-leverage short position on Ethereum (ETH), with a new liquidation price set at $2,399.37.

data.title: NFT buyers who support community members' medical expenses will receive Rave DAO airdrops, with returns ranging from 20x to 500x.
data.description: Crypto KOL LEO posted on the X platform that last December, @ufukless1 needed to pay medical expenses and issued a $10 NFT on OpenSea, with all 15,000 NFTs minted. Subsequently, Rave DAO airdropped RAVE tokens to all minters. This airdrop is currently worth between $200 and $5,000, representing a return of at least 20 times.

data.title: Britain and France will convene a meeting on shipping safety in the Strait of Hormuz.
data.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced on the 13th that he will co-host a leaders' meeting this week with French President Emmanuel Macron on shipping security in the Strait of Hormuz. Starmer told the British Parliament that the meeting will focus on ending the conflict through diplomatic means, reopening the Strait, and providing security guarantees for international shipping once the situation stabilizes. Starmer emphasized that Britain's position on the Middle East situation should prioritize de-escalation and promoting a diplomatic solution to the dispute. Britain will neither support nor participate in any blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. (CCTV News)

data.title: Iranian Ambassador to India: Indian oil tankers passing through the Strait of Hormuz have not paid any passage fees to Iran.
data.description: Iran's ambassador to India said on Monday that Indian oil tankers passing through the Strait of Hormuz have not paid any tolls to Iran. This comes after US President Trump vowed to prevent ships that pay fees to Iran from passing through the strait. "You can ask the Indian government whether we have collected any fees so far," Iranian Ambassador to India Mohammad Fatahari said at a press conference at the Iranian embassy. "We maintain good relations during this difficult time. We believe that Iran and India share common interests and a common destiny," he added. Iran has effectively blocked the strategic waterway since the outbreak of the Iran-Iraq War. India has repeatedly denied paying any fees. India says 15 Indian-flagged vessels remain stranded in the Persian Gulf. (Jinshi)

data.title: Lighter Launches Liquidity Partnership Program for RWA
data.description: Decentralized perpetual contract platform Lighter has introduced a liquidity partnership program to reward participants providing liquidity for Real World Assets (RWA). According to Foresight News, the program will offer incentives to market makers who supply compact and deep liquidity on Lighter's order book. Rewards are distributed through random snapshots of the order book, with the amount to be awarded announced in advance each week. Participants must hold a valid Premium account, and only orders present on the order book at the time of each snapshot are eligible. Assets are categorized into different tiers based on their liquidity characteristics to manage their relative share in the reward pool.
